Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\User\\promptraid" && python -c "
import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
from openai import OpenAI
c = OpenAI\(api_key=os.environ['OPENROUTER_API_KEY'], base_url='https://openrouter.ai/api/v1'\)
models = c.models.list\(\)
for m in models.data:
    if 'qwen' in m.id.lower\(\) and 'free' in m.id.lower\(\):
        print\(m.id\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\User\\promptraid" && python -c "
import os, time
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
from google import genai
c = genai.Client\(api_key=os.environ['GEMINI_API_KEY']\)
try:
    r = c.models.generate_content\(model='gemini-2.0-flash', contents='say hi'\)
    print\('OK 2.0-flash:', r.text[:50]\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('2.0-flash fail:', e\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONPATH="$PWD" python -c "
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
import json
from scripts.live_demo import build_injected_variant, make_tools, run_one
from promptraid.harness.judge import RuleBasedJudge

variant = build_injected_variant\(\)
tools = make_tools\(variant.mutated_payload\)
judge = RuleBasedJudge\(\)

for i in range\(1, 11\):
    verdict, transcript_dict, judge_dict = run_one\('cerebras:gpt-oss-120b', tools, judge\)
    print\(f'[{i}/10] verdict={verdict}'\)
    if verdict == 'success':
        print\(json.dumps\(transcript_dict, indent=2\)\)
        print\('Judge result:'\)
        print\(json.dumps\(judge_dict, indent=2\)\)
        break
")
